allow: Bash(sqlite3 zone4/zone4.db "SELECT type, canonical_name, namespace FROM entities LIMIT 30")
Bash(sqlite3 zone4/zone4.db "SELECT namespace, type, sub_type, COUNT\(*\) FROM entities GROUP BY namespace, type, sub_type ORDER BY namespace, type")
Bash(sqlite3 zone4/zone4.db "SELECT type, sub_type, canonical_name FROM entities WHERE properties LIKE '%Kop Tech%' OR canonical_name LIKE '%Kop%' LIMIT 30")
Bash(claude --print --output-format text --append-system-prompt "You are a test responder." --disallowed-tools "Bash Edit Read Write WebFetch WebSearch Glob Grep Task TodoWrite NotebookEdit")
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8081/v1/query -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"question":"What Go packages exist in this repo and what depends on what?","namespace":"local-dev"}')
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8081/v1/ask -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"question":"What Go packages exist in this repo and what depends on what?","namespace":"local-dev"}')

Bash(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('/tmp/ask_resp.json'\)\); a=d.get\('answer'\) or {}; print\('used_llm=', a.get\('used_llm'\)\); print\('---'\); print\(\(a.get\('text'\) or ''\)[:1500]\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8081/v1/ask -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"question":"Describe what `reasoner` does and what depends on it.","namespace":"local-dev","entity_name":"reasoner"}')
